goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'cheap' price range and should serve 'korean' food.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'asian oriental' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east
Make sure you get entrance fee
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range and should serve korean food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves asian oriental food
Make sure you get phone number
